segments.text: That was the throw off the spot dodge!
segments.original_text: 今度はその場回避を見てからの投げでした

segments.text: The landing's gonna be brutal from that platform spacing
segments.original_text: これジャンプラインじゃ着地が厳しいぞ

segments.text: Looked like they held on there, but...
segments.original_text: 笛を吹いて耐えたかに見えましたが

segments.text: Had one more opening, but it was over
segments.original_text: 一回展開を作ったが最後
終わらないネオのターン

segments.text: That side B goes straight through the dodge
segments.original_text: この横Bは回避を通して

segments.text: Finished it clean in one turn
segments.original_text: ワンターンでそのまま決めきりました
ご視聴ありがとうございました

full_text: That was the throw off the spot dodge! The landing's gonna be brutal from that platform spacing Looked like they held on there, but... Still hitting with the aerial! Now the nair! Perfectly threaded that airdodge Had one more opening, but it was over Neo's relentless pressure That side B goes straight through the dodge And it was absolutely devastating Finished it clean in one turn Thanks for watching!
